calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Liqiong Liu aka Susan Q. Liu was present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication was filed.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Susan Q. Liu.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
